data.title: QBE Insurance Revises Proposed Constitutional Amendments Ahead of AGM
data.description:
QBE Insurance Group Limited ( (AU:QBE) ) has provided an announcement.

QBE Insurance Group Limited has announced changes to the proposed amendments to its constitution, specifically withdrawing the amendment that would have allowed for virtual-only shareholder meetings. This decision comes after recognizing concerns about including explicit provisions for virtual meetings in the constitution. The company will continue to facilitate hybrid meetings, allowing both in-person and online participation, which has been the norm since the pandemic. The revised amendments will be presented for approval at the upcoming 2025 Annual General Meeting, and shareholders have the option to adjust their proxy votes accordingly.

More about QBE Insurance Group Limited

QBE Insurance Group Limited is a prominent player in the insurance industry, offering a wide range of insurance products and services. The company focuses on providing comprehensive insurance solutions and has a significant presence in the global market.

YTD Price Performance: 5.35%

Average Trading Volume: 557

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $17.48B

data.title: Comet Holding AG Reports Strong Q1 2025 Performance Driven by Semiconductor Demand
data.description:
COMET Holding AG ( (CH:COTN) ) has shared an update.

Comet Holding AG reported a robust first quarter in 2025, with net sales rising by 37.5% to CHF 111.2 million and order intake increasing by 30.2% to CHF 118.5 million compared to the previous year. The growth was primarily driven by the semiconductor industry’s demand, particularly in AI applications and data centers, despite challenges in consumer electronics. Comet’s strategic focus on the semiconductor sector and the launch of new products like the Synertia range and CA20 system are expected to bolster its market position and drive future growth.

More about COMET Holding AG

Comet is a globally leading Swiss technology company specializing in plasma control and X-ray technology. It provides high-tech components and systems that enhance product quality and production efficiency across industries such as semiconductor, electronics, automotive, and aerospace. Headquartered in Flamatt, Switzerland, Comet operates worldwide with over 1,800 employees and maintains production sites and subsidiaries in multiple countries.

YTD Price Performance: -23.14%

Average Trading Volume: 38,404

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: CHF1.46B

data.description:
Adslot Ltd ( (AU:ADS) ) just unveiled an update.

Adslot Ltd has announced a change in the interests of its substantial holder, Andrew Dyer and his associates, with an increase in voting power from 5.37% to 6.71%. data.title: Adslot Ltd Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
Adslot Ltd ( (AU:ADS) ) has provided an announcement.

Adslot Ltd has announced a change in the director’s interest notice concerning Andrew Dyer. The company has issued 38,959,250 ordinary shares under the Director Fees Plan, following shareholder approval at the 2024 AGM. This change reflects an increase in the number of shares held by Andrew Dyer indirectly through Securities Markets Capital Pty Ltd, indicating a strategic move to align director compensation with company performance.

data.title: Luks Group Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting and Key Resolutions
data.description:
Luks Group (Vietnam Holdings) Co ( (HK:0366) ) has issued an update.

Luks Group (Vietnam Holdings) Co has announced its Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 28, 2025, in Hong Kong. Key agenda items include the consideration of financial statements, declaration of a final dividend, re-election of directors, and the appointment of auditors. Additionally, the company seeks shareholder approval for general mandates to repurchase shares and issue new shares, which could impact its capital structure and market operations.

data.title: Valor Holdings Reports Mixed Fiscal Year-End Results
data.description:
Valor Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9956) ) has provided an announcement.

Valor Holdings Co., Ltd. reported its business results for the fiscal year ending March 2025, showing varied performance across its divisions. The grocery store segment experienced a 5.9% total increase in sales, while the pharmacy division saw a 3.7% rise. Home improvement stores reported a modest 1% growth. These results reflect the company’s strategic decisions, including designated non-business days, which may impact future operations and stakeholder interests.

More about Valor Holdings Co., Ltd.

Valor Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the retail industry, focusing on grocery stores, pharmacies, and home improvement stores. The company has a significant presence with 1,449 total stores, including supermarkets, pharmacies, home improvement stores, sports gyms, and pet shops.

data.title: Altech Batteries Seeks Shareholder Approval for Security Arrangement
data.description:
Altech Chemicals Limited ( (AU:ATC) ) has shared an announcement.

Altech Batteries Limited has announced a General Meeting for shareholders to approve a security arrangement involving the company’s land in Johor, Malaysia. This move is part of a strategic effort to secure funding for ongoing projects and working capital needs without diluting equity. The company has entered into a binding bond note subscription deed with its major shareholder, Deutsche Balaton AG, to access up to €2.5 million through interest-bearing Bearer Bonds. The land sale proceeds will be used to repay this facility, which allows Altech to continue its development projects while maintaining shareholder value.

More about Altech Chemicals Limited

Altech Batteries Limited is a company operating in the battery industry, focusing on the development of advanced battery materials and technologies. The company’s primary projects include the CERENERGY battery project and the Silumina Anodes battery materials project, with a market focus on innovative energy storage solutions.

data.title: MRG Metals Completes Infill Drilling at Mozambique Project
data.description:
MRG Metals Limited ( (AU:MRQ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

MRG Metals Limited has completed infill drilling at the Magonde target within the Marao HMS Project in Mozambique. The company has visually estimated the total heavy mineral content from panned samples and is awaiting laboratory analyses to confirm these findings. This development is part of MRG Metals’ ongoing efforts to advance its exploration activities and refine its understanding of the mineral resources at the site, potentially impacting its strategic positioning in the mineral sands market.

More about MRG Metals Limited

MRG Metals Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is involved in projects that aim to identify and extract valuable minerals, with a particular emphasis on heavy mineral sands in Mozambique.

Current Market Cap: A$8.18M
